---
name: Security Report
about: Report a vulnerability in the application (Do NOT post public details)
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: security
assignees: ''

---

**Do NOT post specific vulnerability details, exploits, or proof-of-concepts here.**

Please read our [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) for details on our security policy and where to securely report vulnerabilities.

**High-Level Description**
Provide a high-level summary of the vulnerability type (e.g. CSRF in form submission, unauthenticated Firestore write, XSS in text input).

**Vulnerable Area**
Which screen, endpoint, or configuration file does this apply to?

**Impact**
What is the potential impact of this vulnerability? (e.g., unauthorized data disclosure, privilege escalation).
